zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：低位震荡修复格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/美元处于窄幅整理格局，价格围绕6.93附近波动，整体趋势偏弱震荡，但仍守住6.88均线支撑，短线方向不明朗阶段

MACD指标微幅为正但动能不足，信号线未给出确认，短期多空分歧明显，量能不足导致趋势延续性较差，需观察突破方向等待确认中观察中

下方关键支撑位于6.88及6.92区域，若跌破可能测试6.88均线；上方阻力集中在6.98与7.00附近，突破需放量确认区间

操作建议以区间交易为主，短线可在6.92附近轻仓低吸，反弹至6.98逐步止盈；若跌破6.88需严格止损，等待趋势重构确认策略中

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation phase following a short period of compressed volatility. Price action is trading near 6.93, sitting just above the 20-period SMA at 6.88312, indicating a slight bullish bias in the short term. However, the narrow 24-hour range between 6.9229 and 6.9824 suggests indecision, with neither buyers nor sellers establishing clear dominance. Overall structure remains neutral-to-slightly positive.

From an indicator perspective, the MACD reading of 0.01375 signals weak bullish momentum, though the absence of a visible signal line limits confirmation strength. Price holding above the SMA(20) supports a constructive short-term outlook, but momentum is not strong enough to suggest a breakout. Without RSI data, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed, reinforcing the view that current movement is primarily range-bound with a mild upward drift.

Key support is located at 6.92, aligning closely with the session low and acting as the immediate defense for buyers. A break below this level would expose downside toward 6.88, where the SMA(20) may act as dynamic support. Resistance is defined at 6.98, the recent high, with a break above potentially opening the path toward 7.05 and improving bullish continuation prospects if volume expands.

For trading approaches, range strategies remain most suitable in the current environment. Buying near 6.92–6.90 with tight risk control below 6.88 offers a favorable risk-reward setup, targeting 6.98 on the upside. Alternatively, a breakout strategy can be considered above 6.98 with confirmation, aiming for momentum extension. Until a clear directional breakout occurs, disciplined position sizing and respect for range boundaries are essential.
